contacts.notes: Daughter of late Public Bank founder Teh Hong Piow; family ranks #3 on Forbes 2025 Malaysia Rich list with US$5.9B combined net worth. Bought S$93.9M Tanglin Hill GCB in Singapore in 2025 — relocating wealth into SG. Non-crypto banking/RE family wealth.

contacts.name: Peter Lam Kin Ngok
contacts.title: Chairman
contacts.organization: Lai Sun Group / Lai Sun Dining (Individual / 2nd-gen heir)
contacts.notes: Chairman of Lai Sun Group (Lai Sun Garment, Lai Sun Development, eSun Holdings, Lai Fung Holdings, Media Asia). Built Lai Sun Dining (8½ Otto e Mezzo Bombana, China Tang) — 24 high-end restaurants. Son of industrialist Lim Por-yen. Non-crypto RE/F&B/media wealth (~$500M).

contacts.name: Arnold Lee
contacts.title: CEO (2nd Generation)
contacts.notes: Second-generation CEO of Hecny Group, HK logistics/freight forwarding firm founded by his father Charles C.K. Lee in 1951. Recent buyer of $16.9M (HKD132M) The Legacy apartment — signals personal liquidity. Non-crypto traditional logistics wealth.

contacts.name: Hui Sai Fun
contacts.title: Property Tycoon (Patriarch)
contacts.notes: HK property billionaire who passed down a $5.3B fortune via family trust (designed to last 1,750 years). Non-crypto real estate wealth. Family office level allocator with PE/alternatives mandate.

contacts.name: Matt Reid
contacts.title: Founder & Co-Owner
contacts.notes: Founder of Maximal Concepts (60+ venues globally) and flagship Mott 32 (Vancouver, Singapore, Bangkok, Dubai, Las Vegas). 26 original brands across 20+ years. Non-crypto F&B / hospitality wealth.

contacts.name: Malcolm Wood
contacts.title: Co-Founder
contacts.notes: Co-founder of Maximal Concepts. 20+ years driving Hong Kong's F&B scene; opened 50+ F&B concepts personally. Sustainability-focused. Non-crypto F&B/hospitality wealth.

contacts.name: Xuan Mu
contacts.title: Co-Founder
contacts.notes: Co-founder of Maximal Concepts; 25+ years F&B experience. Created some of HK's most successful restaurants and lifestyle venues. Non-crypto F&B wealth.

contacts.name: Syed Asim Hussain
contacts.title: Founder

contacts.name: Marius Lim

contacts.name: Loretta Tao
contacts.title: Angel Investor
contacts.notes: Hong Kong-based angel investor surfaced via HK angel investor lists 2025. Personal wealth deployed via direct investments. Worth verifying LinkedIn profile before outreach.

contacts.name: Gabriel Fong

contacts.name: Haider Ali Khan

contacts.name: Abdallah Abu Sheikh
contacts.title: Founder (Exited Nov 2024)
contacts.notes: Founded Astra Tech in 2022; super-app with PayBy, Rizek, BOTIM, Quantix and 150M+ users across 155 countries. Stepped down as CEO and sold stake to existing shareholders in Nov 2024 — fresh liquidity. Plans to 'build from the ground up' again. Non-crypto SaaS/super-app wealth.
contacts.source: WebSearch (Wikipedia, Gulf News, Zawya, WAYA Media)

contacts.notes: Co-founder & CTO of Astra Tech, stepped in as interim CEO when Abu Sheikh exited Nov 2024. Significant personal equity in $500M-funded super-app. Non-crypto fintech/super-app wealth.

contacts.name: Sam Quawasmi
